rawContent: {"stage":"build","insights":[{"kind":"gotcha","text":"Payload's built-in `auth: true` creates `hash`/`salt` fields automatically; replacing it with a custom `passwordHash` field requires explicit PBKDF2 hooks in `beforeChange` and `afterRead`.","scope":"src/collections/Users.ts"},{"kind":"convention","text":"Use `hidden: true` on sensitive fields like `passwordHash` so they are excluded from API responses but still readable via hooks.","scope":"src/collections/Users.ts"},{"kind":"convention","text":"Barrel exports for collections live in `src/collections/index.ts`; add new collections there and reference from `payload.config.ts`.","scope":"src/collections"},{"kind":"decision","text":"The codebase already uses PBKDF2 in `AuthService`; align the collection's `beforeChange`/`afterRead` hooks with the existing `AuthService` hash strategy rather than introducing a new one.","scope":"src/auth/auth-service.ts"},{"kind":"lesson","text":"When replacing a built-in Payload auth collection, `AuthS
